content:
Dataverse has long offered institution-wide Shibboleth groups: https://guides.dataverse.org/en/latest/installation/shibboleth.html#institution-wide-shibboleth-groups
I'm curious if any installation has used or would like to use the grouperGroups attribute? https://shibboleth.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/KB/pages/1432060485/Grouper+Integration+Example
It looks like you and I talked about Grouper in 2021 during a community call: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1EUuG8IyGsFV28qlzJWuWqP0Z5fob-rAF4f0j4xrPAgY/edit?usp=sharing
